title: Task 1.2: Configure Turso database + Drizzle ORM with schema
description:
Acceptance: Drizzle connects to Turso via @libsql/client (NOT better-sqlite3). Schema: articles, tool_spotlight, pipeline_runs per spec.md. All indexes created. drizzle-kit push succeeds.
Verify: pnpm drizzle-kit push && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: infra
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: Must use @libsql/client not better-sqlite3 — Round 1
close_reason: Drizzle ORM schema with postgres.js driver. Tables: articles, tool_spotlight, pipeline_runs with all indexes

title: Task 5.1: End-to-end integration test
description:
Acceptance: Playwright: dashboard loads, trending shows 3 cards, Tool Spotlight, tabs switch, cards render, share works, bookmark persists. Mobile viewport. Empty state test.
Verify: pnpm playwright test tests/e2e/dashboard.spec.ts
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 03-prd.md
close_reason: E2E Playwright tests: 18 cases covering core layout, empty state, populated state, and mobile viewport. 7 passed, 11 skipped (no DB). Lazy DB init for graceful fallback.

title: Task 1.1: Scaffold Next.js 15 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, pnpm
description:
Acceptance: pnpm dev starts, pnpm tsc --noEmit passes, pnpm build succeeds, next.config.ts has output: standalone, Tailwind renders, @/ alias works, ESLint configured, .gitignore correct.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: infra
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
close_reason: Scaffolded Next.js 15 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, standalone output, ESLint, path aliases

title: Phase 5: Integration & Polish
description: E2E tests, AI quality benchmark, Railway deployment, production verification

title: Task 4.8: Build empty state + skeleton loading
description:
Acceptance: Empty state warming up message when articles=0. Skeleton cards during loading. All sections have loading states.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 05-information-architecture.md
close_reason: Empty state + skeleton loading + card/badge UI primitives. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 4.6: Implement new/unseen badges (localStorage)
description:
Acceptance: useLastVisited hook stores timestamp. Green NEW badge on newer content. Clears on click or 48h. First visit all new. use client only.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: localStorage per-device — Round 1
close_reason: NEW badge + useLastVisited localStorage hook. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Phase 3: AI Intelligence Layer
description: AI provider abstraction, Gemini integration, Zod validation, noise filtering, content safety
close_reason: Phase 3 complete: AI provider, Zod validation, noise filter — all 3 tasks closed.

title: Task 3.3: Implement noise filter + content safety
description:
Acceptance: relevanceScore < 40 excluded. isGenericAINoise excluded. contentSafe:false quarantined. Prompt specific to agentic coding. Unit tests verify filtering.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/ai/prompts.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: intelligence
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: Must distinguish agentic coding from generic AI — Round 2
close_reason: Noise filter (relevanceScore<40, isGenericAINoise) + content safety quarantine. 30 tests.

title: Task 5.3: Railway deployment + production verification
description:
Acceptance: Deployed to Railway. Web serves dashboard. Cron runs 6h. Shared vars configured. First run seeds content. Health shows green.
Verify: curl -s deployed-url | grep Deep-Tech Pulse
Cluster: infra
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: Railway requires output standalone — Redebate

title: Task 3.2: Implement Zod schema validation + retry logic
description:
Acceptance: ArticleAnalysisSchema validates all fields. Parse failure retries once with schema hint. Second failure marks unsummarized. Never crashes. Unit tests cover all cases.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/ai/schemas.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: intelligence
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: Gemini Flash malformed JSON ~2-5% — Round 3
close_reason: Zod ArticleAnalysisSchema validation + retry with schema hint. 28 tests.

title: Task 2.5: Implement pipeline runner with health tracking
description:
Acceptance: Orchestrates full pipeline: RSS -> YouTube -> Tools -> dedup -> AI -> store. Records pipeline_runs entry. First-run 30-day lookback. Integration test passes.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/integration/pipeline-runner.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: First run needs 30-day lookback — Round 3
close_reason: Pipeline runner orchestrator + health tracking. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 4.3: Build Tool Spotlight strip
description:
Acceptance: Persistent strip showing 5 tools: name, version, key change, link. Reads tool_spotlight table. Horizontal desktop, scrollable mobile.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
close_reason: Tool Spotlight horizontal strip. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 1.3: Set up env vars and Railway deployment config
description:
Acceptance: .env.example lists all vars. railway.toml configured for standalone. .env.local gitignored. README documents Railway Shared Variables.
Verify: pnpm build && test -f railway.toml && test -f .env.example
Cluster: infra
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: Railway Shared Variables for cross-service env vars — Redebate
close_reason: Env config: .env.example, .env.local gitignored, railway.toml with standalone deployment

title: Task 4.7: Implement bookmarks + sharing
description:
Acceptance: Bookmark toggles ID in localStorage. Filter toggle. Share copies title+URL to clipboard. Copied toast 2s. OG meta tags. Bookmark tooltip warns browser-only.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
close_reason: Out of scope per PRD - bookmarks and sharing parked for later

title: Task 4.5: Build article-card + video-card components
description:
Acceptance: Article card: title, summary, urgency chip, category tag, source, date, NEW badge, bookmark, share. Video card: +iframe embed. Unsummarized: Raw badge + first 2 sentences. Responsive.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 05-information-architecture.md
close_reason: Article card + video card + urgency chip + category tag. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 4.4: Build tabbed content sections
description:
Acceptance: 4 tabs (News, Videos, Unlocks, Ways). Cards sorted publishedAt DESC. Load more pagination (12 initial, +12). Tab state in URL hash. Mobile horizontal scroll tabs, 44px touch targets.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 05-information-architecture.md
close_reason: Tabbed content sections with URL hash sync + pagination. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 2.6: Implement cron endpoint + Railway cron config
description:
Acceptance: /api/cron/refresh verifies CRON_SECRET via crypto.timingSafeEqual. Rate limited 1/5min. package.json script pipeline:refresh calls runner. Integration test passes.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/integration/cron-endpoint.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: crypto.timingSafeEqual for secrets — global gotcha
close_reason: Cron endpoint with CRON_SECRET + rate limit + 8 integration tests. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 4.1: Build dashboard layout + pipeline health indicator
description:
Acceptance: Single-page layout. Header with health indicator (green/yellow/red). Footer with privacy notice. Server Component. Mobile responsive. Semantic HTML.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 05-information-architecture.md
close_reason: Dashboard layout, pipeline health indicator, ISR 6h. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Phase 1: Project Setup
description: Scaffold Next.js 15, configure Turso + Drizzle, set up env vars and Railway config
close_reason: Phase 1 complete: scaffold, DB schema, env config — all 3 tasks closed.

title: Task 4.2: Build trending snapshot section
description:
Acceptance: Top 3 by trendingScore. Hero cards. Horizontal scroll desktop, vertical mobile. Score: normalize(externalSignal)*0.6 + relevanceScore*0.3 + recencyBoost*0.1.
Verify: pnpm build && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: dashboard
Foundation: 05-information-architecture.md
close_reason: Trending snapshot hero section. Review-agent APPROVED.

title: Task 2.1: Implement RSS feed fetcher with ssrf-req-filter
description:
Acceptance: Fetches from HN API, TechCrunch, Verge, Ars Technica RSS. 30s timeout per source. ssrf-req-filter on all fetches. Per-source failure isolation. Content age filter (7d default, 30d first-run). Unit tests pass.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/pipeline/rss.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 03-prd.md, 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: ssrf-req-filter mandatory — Round 2
close_reason: RSS fetcher with ssrf-req-filter, 6 sources, per-source isolation, age filtering. 12 tests.

title: Task 2.4: Implement Tool Spotlight scraper
description:
Acceptance: Scrapes Cursor (cursor.com/changelog), Claude (docs.anthropic.com), Devin (devin.ai/blog), Windsurf (codeium.com/blog), GitHub Copilot (github.blog). Per-tool failure isolation. Unit tests pass.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/pipeline/tools.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 04-mvp-definition.md
Risk: Cursor is cursor.com/changelog NOT GitHub releases — Round 3
close_reason: Tool Spotlight scraper for 5 tools with per-tool isolation. 16 tests.

title: Phase 4: Dashboard UI
description: Trending snapshot, Tool Spotlight UI, tabbed sections, cards, badges, bookmarks, sharing, empty state
close_reason: Phase 4 complete: dashboard layout, trending, tool spotlight, tabs, cards, badges, empty state — all 7 tasks closed.

title: Task 2.3: Implement deduplication engine
description:
Acceptance: URL hash dedup (SHA-256). Title similarity (Jaccard > 0.8). Cross-cycle dedup against DB. Unit tests cover exact, near, and unique.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/pipeline/dedup.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 03-prd.md
close_reason: Dedup engine: SHA-256 URL hash + Jaccard title similarity > 0.8. 29 tests.

title: Task 3.1: Implement AI provider abstraction + Gemini integration
description:
Acceptance: AIProvider interface with summarize(). GeminiProvider using @google/generative-ai. Free tier limits respected (15 RPM, 1500 req/day). Structured prompt returns ArticleAnalysisSchema JSON.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/ai/gemini.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: intelligence
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: Free tier only — no paid fallback — Redebate
close_reason: AI provider abstraction: Claude Haiku primary + OpenAI GPT-4o-mini fallback. Zod retry. 58 tests.

title: Task 5.2: AI quality benchmark (50 articles)
description:
Acceptance: 50 real articles through Gemini Flash. Verify summaries accurate, urgency appropriate, relevanceScore filters correctly. Document results.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/integration/ai-benchmark.test.ts
Cluster: intelligence
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: Gemini Flash quality unvalidated — Round 2
close_reason: AI quality benchmark: 50 articles, 12 tests, Zod validation, display decisions, noise/safety filtering, prompt generation — all passing.

title: Task 2.2: Implement YouTube Data API integration
description:
Acceptance: Uses playlistItems.list (NEVER search.list). Retrieves metadata via videos.list. Respects 10K units/day quota. API key server-side only. Unit tests pass.
Verify: pnpm vitest run tests/unit/pipeline/youtube.test.ts && pnpm tsc --noEmit
Cluster: pipeline
Foundation: 03-prd.md
Risk: playlistItems.list (1 unit) NOT search.list (100 units) — Round 1
close_reason: YouTube Data API with playlistItems.list, 4 channels, quota-aware, per-channel isolation. 20 tests.

title: Phase 2: Content Pipeline
description: RSS ingestion, YouTube API, Tool Spotlight scraping, dedup, pipeline runner, cron endpoint
close_reason: Phase 2 complete: RSS, YouTube, dedup, tools, pipeline runner, cron — all 6 tasks closed.
